| | Peter,

Are you ready for a governor who will **put Kentucky families first and bring decency and transparency back to our government?** Do you want to do everything you can to spread the word about Andy and Jacqueline's campaign to build a Kentucky that works for all of us?

**[Here's how you can help: sign up to get a FREE BUMPER STICKER, then attach it to your car, bike, laptop, or notebook to proudly display your support for Andy and Jacqueline!](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a03/ad6dc73/147a7606/db7df27/1713221515/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/bumper-sticker-20191007")** | [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a03/ad6dc73/147a7606/db7df27/1713221515/VEsE/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/bumper-sticker-20191007")

\-- Team Beshear

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

Hi, I'm sure you're aware that President Trump is holding a campaign rally in Minnesota this Thursday, but I wanted to make sure you saw the breaking news that they're tripling down. Karen Pence and Lara Trump will now be coming to hold a campaign event on Wednesday, and Vice President Pence will be coming to hold a separate rally on Thursday. **[BREAKING: Trump campaign adds two more Minnesota campaign events this week](https://act.myngp.com/el/TjxwS4pyN0BX2UzsEtpTgHTGgblPCNq8Baod5MBGOog=/6wVgZWj9b7kJw5u7EcES4EE13edzwkGbwc84yhNU6Uc=?refcode=body&amount=25)** Hi, I'm sure you're aware that President Trump is holding a campaign rally in Minnesota this Thursday, but I wanted to make sure you saw the breaking news that they're tripling down. **Karen Pence and Lara Trump will now be coming to hold a campaign event on Wednesday, and Vice President Pence will be coming to hold a separate rally on Thursday.** For both Trump and Pence, this will be the second time they've visited Minnesota this year. They're going all-in on flipping Minnesota red, and they think they can do it with a message of fear and division. But we know better. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Enough is Enough!
body:
When it comes to President Trump, or pretty much any other issue that they oppose, Democrats convict first, and ask questions later.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-349863-812160-4672236-5c154e8836-cb9ba38ac3)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-349863-812160-4672236-5c154e8836-cb9ba38ac3) The incumbent Democrat that I’m running against, Lois Frankel, recently tweeted, “**Enough is enough, I join Americans calling for impeachment proceedings.** ”

Frankel then issued a press release where she said, “The latest allegations that the President pressured the President of Ukraine to investigate a political opponent and is blocking a whistleblower’s complaint detailing those actions, if true, represent a clear abuse of power and impeachable offense.”

But get this, Frankel called for impeachment **BEFORE** President Trump released the unredacted transcript of his call with the President of Ukraine.

When it comes to President Trump, or pretty much any other issue that they oppose, **Democrats convict first, and ask questions later**.

That’s one of the reasons why I’m working hard to flip Florida’s 21st District into the red and to make that happen, [your continued support is needed.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-349863-812160-4672236-5c154e8836-cb9ba38ac3)

Florida’s Democrats in Congress have been among the worst in Washington, from my opponent Frankel, to **Debbie Wasserman-Schultz** and **Donna Shalala**.

Florida is long overdue for a political shift, and that is starting with my race, [and with your support.](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-349863-812160-4672236-5c154e8836-cb9ba38ac3)

Democrats are moving full-steam-ahead with the impeachment of President Trump, and the ONLY reason they’re doing it now is because they are desperate to save face with the radical, socialist wing of their party.

And in 2020, after President Trump is reelected, they’ll try to do it again.

But not if I can help it.

Who would you rather have in Congress 2020? Lois “Enough is Enough” Frankel sitting next to her pals Wasserman-Schultz and Shalala, or me, Laura Loomer who has a proven record of always fighting for the truth.

[Tell Frankel you’ve had enough of her by donating to my campaign today](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-349863-812160-4672236-5c154e8836-cb9ba38ac3). And after you do, please click the link on the following page to send Lois Frankel a special message that will get her attention.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Hunt Raises $450,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Continues to Outpace Lizzie Fletcher’s 2018 Fundraising
Wesley Hunt Raises $450,000
Continues to Outpace Lizzie Fletcher’s 2018 Fundraising
Houston, TX - Today Hunt for Congress announced that Wesley Hunt, Army combat
veteran and Republican for Congress in TX-07, raised nearly half a million
dollars in the last three month, bringing his fundraising total for the first 6
months of the campaign to just shy of $1 million. The majority of the money
raised came from voters in Texas:

“Success in politics requires teamwork, and I am humbled to have so many
people joining our campaign and helping us achieve another impressive
fundraising milestone,” Hunt said. “Over the last three months, it has become
more and more clear to the voters that Congresswoman Fletcher is not
representing them and has not kept her promise to be independent. She’s voted
with Pelosi 100 percent of the time and now she’s supporting a divisive,
partisan impeachment effort. I will bring people together for solutions and
defend our way of life, and I am honored to have so many people stepping up to
join our campaign.”

By comparison, Lizzie Fletcher only raised $184,000 during the same period of
her campaign in 2018. Over the first six months of Hunt’s candidacy, he’s
raised $960,000 compared to only $549,000 for Fletcher over the first 6 months
of her 2018 campaign.

In addition to building the financial resources to run a winning campaign,
Hunt is building a strong grassroots effort, already knocking on over 10,000
doors, recruiting over 100 volunteers and interns, and hosting well-attended
meet and greets throughout the 7th district. Hunt recently earned the
endorsement of Senator Ted Cruz, hosted a huge Women for Wes coalition kickoff,
and has announced dozens of grassroots endorsements from local elected
officials and precinct chairs.

name: Yang2020.com
subject: Falling short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Can you help us get back on track towards our October budget goals by chipping in before midnight?

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1403%2E377263%2ErE-45w) Yang Gang --

**But over the first few days of October, we’re falling short of where we thought we would be to hit our increased budget goals.** And while many campaigns would just host another fundraiser with big donors or rely on the media to cover a growing campaign like ours -- we can’t.

name: Megan West
subject: The effort to silence the pro-life message
body:
| | A Conversation with Lila Rose, President of Live Action
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k8UkvxCWIzGvm30JJsfQL8I&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=1&v=1139)
| Hi Peter, There is perhaps no issue more important to both Christians and Secularists than the subject of abortion. We’ve witnessed the dramatic contrast between two very different ideologies play out in state legislatures across our nation, and we don’t have to look any further than the state of Alabama’s ban on abortions and the state of New York’s endorsement of abortions up until the moment of birth. We’ve seen the sheer bias from social media giants who repeatedly support the abortion industry by censoring pro-life organizations. **Lila Rose is one of the most influential voices in our nation on the sanctity of life, and she stands unafraid to challenge the secular worldview that has propelled abortion worldwide.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k8UkvxCWIzGvm30JJsfQL8I&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=2&v=1139) I had a fascinating interview with Lila, President of the pro-life organization Live Action, to gain her perspective on this unique cultural moment happening where life and abortion are at the forefront of political discussion. | | _The reason why I dedicated so much of my life this cause is because there are nearly 3,000 children a day being legally killed by abortion and there is nothing else that compares as far as a legally supported crime against our most vulnerable._ Lila Rose
---|---
To date, Live Action has more than 3.6 million social media followers, and they have reached millions of people with educational resources exposing the horrors of the abortion industry. But their message is being strategically censored.
[Watch my conversation with Lila](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k8UkvxCWIzGvm30JJsfQL8I&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=3&v=1139) and learn from someone on the front lines working to defend the most basic human right - the right to life.
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5k8UkvxCWIzGvm30JJsfQL8I&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=4&v=1139)
**United. We Stand.**
Megan West
Media Director
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=5&v=1139)

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=7&v=1139) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=8&v=1139) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191008com01&n=9&v=1139)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Monumental LGBTQ discrimination cases in front of the Supreme Court today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Today is a nerve-racking day at the Supreme Court \-- they are hearing 3 cases on LGBTQ discrimination that could alter the lives of millions of Americans. Lines started forming Sunday with pride flags, anticipation, and LGBTQ folx waiting to listen as 9 people would determine their futures. Aimee Stephens is one of those people whose future is on the line. In 2013, she told her co-workers at a Michigan funeral home where she'd worked for six years that she was transgender. She wrote to them, "What I must tell you is very difficult for me and is taking all the courage I can muster." Two weeks later, she was fired. The decisions from her case and the two others will have major ramifications on how LGBTQ people are treated across the country \-- right now, in many states, you can be fired, evicted, and denied a job simply for expressing who you are and who you love. If the Court gives its stamp of approval to this discrimination, we will be set back decades in the fight for equality. We'll keep you updated on the progress of these cases, and our fight to take back the Senate and the White House and ensure that equal rights will not be denied in our future. Thank you for standing for equality, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddff/6e9863e8/1547210a/1db0e04e/2248280395/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20191008a&refcode2=f7cBfwnm6QBnpuS8FHpO")

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: can I be candid?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
With President Trump continuing to act beneath the office and Republican Mitch McConnell blocking votes in the Senate, there has never been a more important time for Democrats to hold our ground -- and our seats.
But I only won by 1,017 votes, and Trump has been spending time in New Hampshire rallying Republicans and trying to flip some of our Democratic seats to GOP control. Candidly, I'm nervous about whether or not we'll be able to stop our Senate seat from flipping.
You're one of my top supporters, and I'm really counting on your help. [**Will you please give $3 or more today so that we can hit our one-day, $10,000 fundraising goal to protect this Democratic Senate seat?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3e2/2a380d31/3d8c5530/f0d542/3334990376/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTAwOF8xZGF5LTFfNm1vIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191008_1day-1_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
New Hampshire elections are always close. I'm ready for a tough fight, but I need your help to win. Thanks for being part of this.

body:
The bottom line: "USMCA will add more than $68 billion to our economy and create another 176,000 American jobs. That includes nearly 50,000..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=505162a695&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Vice President Pence: We Need the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement For Trade**

“While the last administration saw America lose 200,000 manufacturing jobs, since President Trump’s election, we’ve seen more than half a million manufacturing jobs created all across America, including more than 18,000 here in Arizona. But that’s just what this businessman-turned-President Donald Trump calls a ‘good start,’” Vice President Mike Pence writes in the _Arizona Daily Star_.

Now, Congress must decide whether it cares more about American workers than politics. “To keep the momentum going, Congress must pass a trade deal that President Trump negotiated with our neighbors to the North and South: the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement.”

The bottom line: “USMCA will add more than $68 billion to our economy and create another 176,000 American jobs. That includes nearly 50,000 good manufacturing jobs.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=323f0c2fe9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The Trump administration signed trade agreements with Japan on Monday that will eliminate or slash tariffs on $7 billion worth of U.S. farm products and foster digital trade,” Tom Howell Jr. reports for [_The Washington Times_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cd7cdb19f9&e=3ee4985eea). “Japan will cut its levies on American beef, pork, wheat, cheese, wine and other products. Once implemented, more than 90% of U.S. farm imports into Japan will be duty-free or receive preferential tariff treatment.”
---
|
---
| First Lady “Melania Trump said Monday that companies ‘must stop’ marketing e-cigarettes to children, saying they are addictive and dangerous,” Darlene Superville reports for [_The Associated Press_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9775feba2&e=3ee4985eea). Mrs. Trump became the first First Lady ever to visit the U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration headquarters yesterday, where she addressed a rally to mark the start of the annual “Red Ribbon Week” later this month.
---
|
---
| Americans won’t hear the facts from Democrats on their impeachment inquiry, as they’ve shrouded the process in secrecy and have already prejudged the case, Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) writes in [_USA Today_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4fe53ea61&e=3ee4985eea). If they want to demand transparency from the President, then Democrats must take their own advice and open up the process—now.
---
|

---

---

Trump and Lewis are counting on Democrats taking it easy in 2020 so they can turn Minnesota red. We need to show them there's no way we'll let them use division and fear to win our state.

**We've set a goal to have as many people commit to vote Democrat as there will be seats at Trump's rally -- 19,356. Are you in?**

**[Add your name if you're committed to voting Democrat in 2020 -- shut down Trump and Jason Lewis before they get started.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/s/commit2vote?refcode=em191008trumpvote-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

name: Margaret Good
subject: Has to stop now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
Vern Buchanan has turned a blind eye to the issues arising from climate change. But that isn't the only issue he has ignored, on many of our most critical challenges, he takes votes that are against our interests.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/5C8OiLHXQ98Q5C00pIDIshr8Zzq2sixyNtzxlQs3x7U=/wwaUbhC-_M7dWOBA9us5_0tOG6ixEpUFy6hifnvBHAE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.08_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---
Team,

Rising sea levels. Devastating hurricanes. Red Tide. Ocean warming.

What's happening to our environment up and down the coasts of Florida threatens our way of life, and if we don't do something now to change the course we're headed down, we won't be able to reverse the dangers we're facing.

**That 's why, right here in the Sunshine State, I'm working to build a Florida fueled by sunshine. **

I'm finding common-sense solutions -- like investing in diverse, efficient, and renewable energy sources -- to address one of our region's most pressing crises, because that's what citizens should expect from their elected officials: Someone who sees a problem and works to address it.

But, that's not how our current representative operates: Vern Buchanan has turned a blind eye to the issues arising from climate change. But that isn't the only issue he has ignored. On many of our most critical challenges, he takes votes that are against our interests.

[**Friends, our communities are flooding, our prescription drug prices are skyrocketing, our infrastructure is crumbling -- and we need a representative who will address these issues.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/5C8OiLHXQ98Q5C00pIDIshr8Zzq2sixyNtzxlQs3x7U=/wwaUbhC-_M7dWOBA9us5_0tOG6ixEpUFy6hifnvBHAE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.08_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) | **[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/5C8OiLHXQ98Q5C00pIDIshr8Zzq2sixyNtzxlQs3x7U=/wwaUbhC-_M7dWOBA9us5_0tOG6ixEpUFy6hifnvBHAE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.08_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)**
---
Vern has aligned himself with Washington special interests -- it's part of the reason why we've seen no progress on these issues. That has to stop and it has to stop now.

**Truthfully, our country and our community cannot take Vern 's failed leadership any longer, but I'm going to need your help if we're going to flip this seat.

[If you can, make a contribution and help support our people-powered campaign to create a better future for Southwest Florida.](https://act.myngp.com/el/5C8OiLHXQ98Q5C00pIDIshr8Zzq2sixyNtzxlQs3x7U=/wwaUbhC-_M7dWOBA9us5_0tOG6ixEpUFy6hifnvBHAE=?refcode=em_fr_2019.10.08_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **

body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf3f/3eb3e2fc/5337b1e1/744c8ea6/385949708/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191008_em_matamoros-donation&source=20191008_em_matamoros-donation")
---
| | Yesterday, I visited a camp in Matamoros, Mexico where hundreds of asylum-seekers wait in desperation due to Donald Trump's so-called "Remain in Mexico" policy. What I witnessed was horrific. |
---

Babies as old as 20-weeks were being fanned by their mothers to keep cool, children were bathing and drinking from a contaminated river, and families of four or five were cramming into small tents.

This camp was the result of Trump's intentional cruelty towards immigrants. The cruelty is the point.

---

We met with representatives from the Texas Civil Rights Project who have been working tirelessly to advocate for these men, women, and children.

I accompanied 12 LGBTQ and disabled asylum seekers across the border to make lawful claims.

But hours later, all 12 were sent back.

This is heartbreaking. This is infuriating. This is un-American.

---

We will not give up this fight. The Texas Civil Rights Project and others will keep fighting for these vulnerable migrants -- but they need our help.

[I'm asking you to make a contribution to the organizations on the ground fighting for their rights. ](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf3f/3eb3e2fc/5337b1e1/744c8ea5/385949708/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.teambrownsville.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+asking+you+to+make+a+contributio&utm_campaign=20191008_em_matamoros-donation&source=20191008_em_matamoros-donation")

America should not be a place where we slam the door in the face of immigrants or lock them in cages.

We have a lot of work to do.
\--
In solidarity,
Julian

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump needs to stop taking money from military schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Trump's border wall is wildly unpopular. He could not convince Congress to fund it, even after forcing a record-long government shutdown in January. He has thrown tantrums, tweeted up storms, rallied his base, and used racial scare tactics in an attempt to buoy support for the wall. Now, he's resorted to declaring a national emergency and diverting desperately needed, congressionally appropriated defense dollars from Pentagon projects to build his wall. These $3.6 billion in funds were supposed to go toward upgrading military bases across the globe \-- including upgrading schools on military bases, housing facilities for military families, and upgrades at our service academies. This latest move by Trump hurts our military's ability to stay prepared and ready for any conflict while also going back on promises made to members of our armed forces to protect them and their families. [**Join us in telling Trump that he needs to stop playing games with military families and Americans over his wall. He is being irresponsible with our tax money and harming those who are serving this nation. Add your name to ours and say enough is enough!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdde0/6e9863e8/1540b286/1db0e0ad/111054046/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/trumpwallfunding/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you so much for your support. -WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdde0/6e9863e8/1540b286/1db0e0ad/111054046/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/trumpwallfunding/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

name: Amy Mesner, SaraGideon.com
subject: The Supreme Court just announced it will hear its first big case on abortion since Kavanaugh joined the Court.
body:
Here's what we're facing:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c83/4bef7a87/6b4cdbaa/287f2f3a/3766350415/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
The Supreme Court just announced it will hear its first big case on abortion since Kavanaugh joined the Court. Here's what we're facing:
**"[This] may not be the final straw for _Roe v. Wade_ -- indeed, it is fairly likely that the Court will prefer to dismantle the right to an abortion in incremental steps. But it is likely to, at the very least, be the beginning of the end."**
_-VOX_
[**We must flip the Senate and stop them ->**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c83/4bef7a87/6b4cdbaa/287f2f39/3766350415/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191008-full")
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c83/4bef7a87/6b4cdbaa/287f2f39/3766350415/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191008-full")****
**_Roe v. Wade_ is at risk - but that's not the only fight before us now. **Brett Kavanaugh and the rest of the conservative justices on the Court don't need to overturn _Roe_ to essentially achieve their goal of outlawing abortion in this country. They can do it in small, incremental steps.
Just look at this new case, _June Medical Services v. Gee._ It centers on a Louisiana law forcing abortion providers to gain admitting privileges at a nearby hospital. Sound familiar?
That's because the Supreme Court heard an _almost identical_ case in 2016 and struck down the law because it was an undue burden on patients. Now this issue will be relitigated - and with Gorsuch and Kavanaugh on the bench, there might be the votes needed to uphold a law that would severely restrict access to abortions and force clinics to shut down.
Using cases like _Gee_ , the Supreme Court is opening the door for states to essentially eliminate abortion access without banning the procedure outright.
**If we want to stop them, we MUST flip the Senate to stop Trump and Senate Republicans from confirming any more anti-choice justices. Can we count on your help?**
[**Make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign today. It is critically important that we flip the Senate now. Otherwise Trump won't stop with Gorsuch and Kavanaugh - there will be more.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c83/4bef7a87/6b4cdbaa/287f2f39/3766350415/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191008-full")
Susan Collins voted to confirm both Gorsuch and Kavanaugh. She proved that she is willing to help Trump and McConnell achieve their goal of stacking the Court with anti-choice justices.
This is our chance to defeat her, so let's give Sara's race everything we've got.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c83/4bef7a87/6b4cdbaa/287f2f39/3766350415/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMDgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191008-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c83/4bef7a87/6b4cdbaa/287f2f38/3766350415/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c83/4bef7a87/6b4cdbaa/287f2f3f/3766350415/VEsB/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Here’s a sneak peak: "I am running against Trump for the Republican nomination for president in part to return the United States to the stable, bipartisan foreign policy that brought the United States through the Cold War. This means restoring deep connections with our European and Asian allies and with Israel. It means building on the changes that brought Middle Eastern countries into alignment against religious extremism and terrorism. It means supporting African countries in their battles against terrorists and their efforts to build effective, independent democracies. And it means recognizing that issues such as the environment and the future of our planet demand multilateral cooperation." [**Now, can you help us spread the word? We’re going to need all the help we can get to cut through the noise coming out of Washington. name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: The non-impeachment news you might have missed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cdcf/6cd27893/5241adb5/15874fbb/169980530/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | As the House of Representatives continues its investigation into impeachable offenses committed by this President, our work to serve the people continues. Just a few of the things you might have missed over the last couple weeks:
* We learned that the Trump administration intends to **dramatically cut back the number of refugees** accepted to our country to the lowest level in our history. I'm leading a team of 16 Senators calling on the President to restore a refugee policy that saves lives, increases our global influence, and reduces violence around the world.

* We've achieved a big milestone for the RAWR Act, **my legislation to stop wildlife poachers** trafficking in elephants, rhinos, and other at-risk animals. It passed through the Senate Foreign Relations Committee on a bipartisan vote.

* The US House passed my bipartisan bill to **allow cannabis businesses access to use banks**. It's common sense. After all, requiring them to operate on an all-cash basis is an invites crime and puts lives at risk. Next up, the Senate.

* In committee, I secured an **additional $938 million in funding to reduce homelessness** , including rental assistance for 1.2 million families. Next up, a full Senate vote.

Like you, I'm stunned by the bombshell revelations that seem to come out every day about what the President is doing to undermine our democracy and our international standing. And we'll take action, one way or another. Meanwhile, we can't let Donald Trump stop our progress on critical things that matter to the American people. Onward, _Jeff_ |

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Workers deserve fair wages, not closed plants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The United Auto Workers (UAW) have been on strike for four weeks and counting, shutting down production in General Motors factories across the country. Workers began the strike after negotiations with GM fell through over their move to transfer more production to Mexico, shuttering plants in America and putting many skilled workers out of a job. This strike is about more than just GM, though. It's about workers being able to speak up and demand fair treatment, livable wages, and company benefits. It's about workers being valued for their skills and expertise. It's about companies not being able to shut out and ignore workers when they voice concerns. The Trump administration has been noticeably silent on this strike \-- probably because Trump campaigned on helping workers but has instead stood by while plants close, company profits soar, and workers' rights are being torn to shreds by judges he nominated. We want to know what engaged Democratic voters think about this so we can set up our strategy to help workers in the 2020 elections: **Do you support workers ' rights?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdde2/6e9863e8/1542226b/1db0e0cc/345020124/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/rKQph0o-x") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdde2/6e9863e8/1542226b/1db0e0cc/345020124/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/rKQph0o-x") When Democrats Turn Out stands with the UAW members on the picket line and all workers \-- because we know that when people organize, we win. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdde2/6e9863e8/1542226b/1db0e0d2/345020124/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20191008c.ND-b&refcode2=PDpI3qCk5t4HL1kmGQpp")

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'm extremely proud of this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
The first five weeks of this campaign show that we're building a powerful grassroots operation that can defeat Cory Gardner and his special-interest allies. Here are the numbers. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/637714b8/691c9bd/6e3767d9/11a79949/3005871378/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

Our campaign just released the fundraising numbers we'll be filing with the Federal Elections Commission--and they tell a pretty incredible story:
* You all chipped in over 21,000 grassroots donations, spanning 59 of CO's 64 counties, to get our operation off the ground.
* In just five weeks, this team raised $2.1 million.
* The average grassroots donation was just $26. And 95% of our donations came from people giving $200 or less.

My opponent just released his numbers today as well, raising $2.45 million in the last three months. Cory Gardner now has $6.7 million in the bank--millions from corporate PAC's, big money donors, and special interests like the NRA.

We're building a real grassroots campaign--one person at a time chipping in what they can when they can--and that's what it'll take to go toe to toe with whatever Gardner and his special-interest friends throw our way.

**We 've made incredible progress in just five weeks--now let's start closing the fundraising gap.** [**_Will you chip in our average grassroots donation of $26 or more today to keep growing this campaign the right way?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191008_JH_20191008-fr-JH-report-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

I'm extremely proud of these numbers and to be fighting alongside you.

Thank you,

John [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191008_JH_20191008-fr-JH-report-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: By June I was visibly pregnant -- and the principal told me the job I'd already been promised for the next year would go to someone else.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
It's important for the public to know just how pervasive pregnancy discrimination is, and how many families it affects. If you or someone you know has ever faced discrimination in the workplace... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528560/45c30650/10ed9e34e/66f11cb6/910172664/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Ever since I was in second grade, I knew I wanted to be a public school teacher. And after some twists and turns, I got to live my dream.

But when I was 22 and finishing my first year of teaching, I had an experience millions of women will recognize.

By June I was visibly pregnant -- and the principal told me the job I'd already been promised for the next year would go to someone else.

This was 1971, years before Congress outlawed pregnancy discrimination -- but we know it still happens in subtle and not-so-subtle ways. **We can fight back by telling our stories. I tell mine on the campaign trail, and I hope to hear yours.**

[**It's important for the public to know just how pervasive pregnancy discrimination is, and how many families it affects. If you or someone you know has ever faced discrimination in the workplace for being pregnant, join me and share your story today:**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528560/45c30650/10ed9e34e/66f11cb9/910172664/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUszMVBfRUdSX0JJT19FXzIwMTkxMDA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-workplace-discrimination?source=EMK31P_EGR_BIO_E_20191008_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

| [ **SHARE YOUR STORY**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528560/45c30650/10ed9e34e/66f11cb9/910172664/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUszMVBfRUdSX0JJT19FXzIwMTkxMDA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-workplace-discrimination?source=EMK31P_EGR_BIO_E_20191008_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

Pregnancy discrimination has affected countless women and families nationwide.

As Trudy Randall, another teacher at Riverdale Elementary, told _CBS News_ recently, "The rule was at five months you had to leave when you were pregnant. Now, if you didn't tell anybody you were pregnant, and they didn't know, you could fudge it and try to stay on a little bit longer. But they kind of wanted you out if you were pregnant."

In 1978, Congress officially banned pregnancy discrimination, but we know it continues to happen today in both obvious and less obvious ways, from women being nervous about interviewing for a job while pregnant to worrying about repercussions of taking parental leave to flat-out being let go for being pregnant.

[**Our stories matter. I'm going to keep talking about my experience, and I hope you'll join me and share your story today.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528560/45c30650/10ed9e34e/66f11cb9/910172664/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUszMVBfRUdSX0JJT19FXzIwMTkxMDA4X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-workplace-discrimination?source=EMK31P_EGR_BIO_E_20191008_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[ **DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528560/45c30650/10ed9e34e/66f11cb8/910172664/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzMxUF9FR1JfQklPX0VfMjAxOTEwMDhfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK31P_EGR_BIO_E_20191008_V1S1_P")
---
